channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Andy Burnham outlines priorities for his first speech as UK Prime Minister
item.description: Andy Burnham, the newly appointed UK Prime Minister, will deliver his first speech outside No 10 on Monday, pledging to provide 'more breathing room' for citizens amid economic challenges. The speech ...

item.title: CJP's Parliament Protest Amid Security Measures and Legal Restrictions
item.description: The Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) plans a protest march towards Parliament on Monday despite Delhi Police denying permission. The protest coincides with the opening of Parliament's Monsoon Session, rais...

item.title: New Zealander Ryan Fox claims first Major title at 10-under par in 154th British Open
item.description: South African golfer Ryan Fox secured his first Major title at the 154th British Open after a thrilling final round at Royal Birkdale. The 39-year-old New Zealander, ranked 56th in the world, carded a...

item.title: Africa's infrastructure push: Energy and transport set to lead next decade's growth
item.description: The article discusses how Africa's next wave of infrastructure investment will be led by energy, transport, and logistics. Bowale Odumade, founder of SeedTree Capital, emphasizes that reliable electri...

item.title: Democrats Face Midterm Challenges Despite Trump's Low Approval
item.description: A long-time pollster warns Democrats may struggle to capitalize on Trump's declining approval ratings during the November midterms. While Trump's approval has fallen below historical thresholds that t...

item.title: World Cup 2026 Final Half-Time Show Details Revealed: Performers, Timing, and Viewing Options
item.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 final, scheduled for July 19, 2026, at the New York/New Jersey Stadium, will feature a half-time show designed to appeal to diverse cultural audiences. The event, inspired by S...

item.title: Motorcycle Crash Closes County Road 27 in Barrie
item.description: A motorcycle crash on County Road 27 in Barrie has resulted in a road closure, disrupting local traffic. The incident occurred on July 19, 2026, and authorities are investigating the cause. While the ...

item.title: maharashtra-forms-committee-to-review-quota-benefits-for-converted-scheduled-tribes
item.description: the maharashtra government has established a 27-member committee to assess whether members of scheduled tribes (sts) who convert to other religions can retain their eligibility for reservation benefit...

item.title: Delhi police tightens security for CJP's parliamentary protest under Section 163
item.description: The Delhi Police has imposed prohibitory orders under Section 163 of the Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita (BNSS) in parts of New Delhi ahead of the Cockroach Janta Party's (CJP) proposed 'Chalo Sans...

item.title: Decisions Shape Your Destiny
item.description: The article emphasizes that every decision we make has consequences that shape our lives. It argues that individuals are responsible for their choices, which determine their opportunities, challenges,...

item.title: House Prosecution Pushes for Access to Sara Duterte's Financial Records Amid Impeachment Trial
item.description: The House prosecution panel in the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte is facing resistance from her defense team regarding the disclosure of her financial records. Panel member Benjamin ...

item.title: Cabo Verde Simplifies Entry Rules with Visa-Free Access, EASE Registration, and Visa-on-Arrival Options
item.description: Cabo Verde continues to promote international tourism by maintaining one of Africa's most accessible entry systems for foreign visitors. Citizens from the European Union, the Schengen Area, the United...

item.title: UN report reveals high pre-trial detention rates in Africa
item.description: A new United Nations report highlights that over a third (34%) of Africa's prison population is held without trial, with stark regional disparities. The study, titled 'Prison Matters 2026', found that...

item.title: Protesters clash with authorities over exam leaks and activist detention in India
item.description: The Indian government has prohibited a planned protest by the 'Cockroach' movement, which advocates against education minister Rajesh Sharma's alleged involvement in exam paper leaks. The movement gai...

item.title: Trump's Escalation in Iran Risks a Larger Regional Conflict
item.description: The article critiques Donald Trump's escalation of military strikes against Iran, arguing that the campaign has transformed a failed strategy into a perpetual cycle of conflict. Initial attacks aimed ...

item.title: Rising Foreclosures Create Opportunities for Bargain Hunters in 2026
item.description: Foreclosure rates in the U.S. reached their highest level since 2019 in the first half of 2026, with 228,000 homes facing foreclosure filings, up 21% from the previous year. This surge has created opp...

item.title: Victoria introduces demasking powers to combat online abuse
item.description: Victoria's Premier Jacinta Allan has announced new legal reforms aimed at protecting children from online abuse by requiring social media platforms to identify anonymous accounts engaged in harmful be...

item.title: ANC finalises mayoral candidates for local elections amid factional tensions
item.description: The African National Congress (ANC) is finalising its list of mayoral candidates for the upcoming local government elections on November 4, with a focus on unifying party factions ahead of contentious...

item.title: World Cup 2026: Analysts Share Predictions For Upcoming Matches

item.title: Understanding Stress, Anxiety, and Depression: When to Seek Professional Help
item.description: The article explores the distinctions between stress, anxiety, and depression, emphasizing the importance of recognizing symptoms and seeking timely professional assistance. It highlights that stress ...
